mapper.select: SELECT comp_id, legal_id, legal_nm, legal_cd, ord_seq, use_yn FROM esg.tb_legal_manage_type WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn DESC, ord_seq

SELECT tdlmt.legal_id, tdlmt.legal_cd, tdlmt.legal_nm, tdlmt.ord_seq, tdlmt.use_yn, tdlmt.remark AS desc FROM dataset.tb_dataset_legal_manage_type tdlmt WHERE tdlmt.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tdlmt.ord_seq ASC;
select a.major_cd, a.minor_cd, a.minor_nm, a.minor_desc, a.remark, a.ord_seq, a.use_yn from esg.tb_common_d a where a.major_cd = #{majorCd} and a.use_yn = 'Y' order by a.ord_seq
mapper.insert: insert into esg.tb_legal_manage (write_year , doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, legal_id, legal_nm, use_yn, div_fg, revision_at, revision_by, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, confirmed_yn) values(#{writeYear} , #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{legalId}, #{legalNm}, #{useYn}, #{divFg}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{revisionAt}, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS'), #{revisionBy}, now(), #{createdBy}, now(), #{updatedBy}, #{confirmedYn})
mapper.update:
UPDATE esg.tb_legal_manage SET confirmed_yn = #{confirmedYn},
confirmed_dt = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD'),
confirmed_dt = '',
updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{legalId} IS NULL OR #{legalId} = '' THEN to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(legal_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') ELSE #{legalId} END FROM esg.tb_legal_manage_type WHERE legal_id LIKE to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId}
insert into esg.tb_legal_manage_type ( comp_id, legal_id, legal_nm, legal_cd, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{compId}, #{legalId}, #{legalNm}, #{legalCd}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: update esg.tb_legal_manage_type set legal_nm = #{legalNm}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where legal_id = #{legalId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
UPDATE esg.tb_legal_manage_type SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE legal_id = #{legalId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.select: select a.write_year, a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.legal_nm, a.revision_at , a.created_at , a.created_by , a.updated_at , a.updated_by from esg.tb_legal_manage a where a.comp_id = #{compId} and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo}

WITH original_data AS ( SELECT a.legal_nm, b.article_title, a.revision_at, b.article_content, b.remark_dc, CAST(b.doc_seq AS INTEGER) as doc_seq FROM esg.tb_legal_manage a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage_detail b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no where a.comp_id = #{compId} and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} ),
data_count AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM original_data )
SELECT * FROM original_data
order by doc_seq asc;

select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.legal_nm , t1.revision_at , t1.created_at , t1.created_by , t1.updated_at , t1.updated_by from esg.tb_legal_manage t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.doc_no = #{docNo} and t1.comp_id = #{compId}
